name: Proxy / IP smoke test
description: Verifies the profile is routing through its assigned proxy. Visits ipify (returns the exit IP as JSON), captures it via extract_text + save_var, then visits browserleaks for a human-readable secondary check. The captured IP is stored in the run's vars as 'reported_ip' so it shows up in the run detail log — useful for confirming a rotating proxy actually rotated, or that a dedicated proxy hasn't silently fallen back to the host's direct connection.

flow.comment: ipify returns {"ip":"x.x.x.x"} as the page body. We capture the whole text; the user can post-process it from run vars.

flow.code: try { const j = JSON.parse(document.body.innerText); return j.ip || ''; } catch(e) { return ''; }
flow.comment: Pulls the bare IP out of the JSON for cleaner display in run logs.
browserleaks renders WebRTC + DNS + IP geolocation server-side, so a short dwell is enough.
